titleStmt.title: SII 26.732: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 732. (A.R. No. 681 of 1909.) TIRUNEḌUṄGAḶAM, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the Gaṇēśa shrine in the same temple.
This inscription is damaged in some places.

It records some gifts to the god Mahādēvar of Tiruneḍuṅgaḷam, a dēvadāṉa in Kavira-nāḍu made by a certain Bāla(Pāl ?) Vāyaṟṟūr-kiḻavaṉ Kīrtti Āyiravaṉ. One of them was the gift of 61 cows to provide for the daily bathing of the image of the god at noon by pañchagavya; another was the gift of 7 cows to provide for bathing the same image with ghee on saṅkarānti days and to burn a lamp during the period of such bathing ceremonies; the third was the gift of 45 sheep to provide for the burning, during day-time daily, a nandā lamp; and the fourth was the gift of a bell-metal standing lamp, (nilai-viḷakku) for this purpose.

It also records that the above-mentioned donor accepted some paddy from the Vaṇṇār (washermen) of the place, out of the interest on which, some service was to be done on every saṅkarānti day. It also records a gift of some land to provide for the burning of incense daily in the temple and a gift of an incense-burner made of bell-metal weighing 64 palam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korā
jarājakesaripanma
ṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu ka
viranāṭṭu perumāṉār tevatā
ṉan tiruneṭuṅkaḷattu mahā
devarkku Ivvūr pālvāyaṟṟūr ki
ḻavaṉ kirtti Āyiravaṉ Ittevarkku padvacavya
m nicatam madhyāṉattāṭiyaruḷa pāl nāṉāḻi
kkun tayir Irunāḻikku neyāḻākkukkum
komuttiram Irunāḻikkuṅ komayattukkum Āka padva
kavyam Ippaṭi nicati Āṭiyaruḷa vaitta pacu Aṟupat
toṉṟum Ittevar tekkavattām [10]ḷampaṟṟil caṅkarā
ntitoṟu Āṭiyaruḷa vaitta neyyirupatiṉāḻiyum Ā
ṭi Aruḷumaḷavun tiruviḷakkerikka ney nāḻiyu Āka ney
Irupattoru nāḻikkum vaitta pacu Eḻum pañcakavya
āṭi Aruḷa vaitta pacu A ṇi pūṅ
kāvaṉ centaṉum Eḻu luntampimārum
vaḻi pacu Irupatum kāṭaṉ caṅkaraṉum kāṭaṉ � ṉeṉum
kulavaṉ cūtaṉum tampimārum pūṅkāvaṉ ceṉṉu
n=tampimārum kañcāṟañ caṅkaraṉu n=tampimārum tiṉai
yaṉ ciṅkaṉum Ivarkaḷ vacam pacu Irupatum cū
raṉ kāmaṉum cūraṉ tavaraṉum cūraṉ malaiyaṉum cūraṉ
caṭaiyaṉum cūraṉ kaṇṭaṉum Ivarkaḷ vacam pacu Irupatum
gomūttirattukkum gomayattukkum Āka ma muṉ
ṟu papāṭṭattār vacam [ svāmi kāriyam] Oṉṟu
m Āṭi Aruḷa ney Irupatiṉāḻikku n=tiruviḷakkerikka ney nāḻi
kkum kuṭimaṉṟāṭi vaṭukaṉ tuṟuppāṭiyum vaṭukaṉ pū
tiyum vacam pacu Eḻum Āka vaitta pacu Aṟupatteṭṭum
Ivai cāvā muvāp perumpacuvāka can=tirātittaval Āṭi Aruḷa
vum Ivaṉe Itte
varkku pakal tirunontā vi
ḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku nitta
ney Āḻākkiṉukku vaitta
Āṭu nāṟpattaiñcuṅ koṇṭu
tiruviḷakku ney Aṭṭakkaṭaviya kuṭitevaṉ maṉṟāṭi
cen=ta ṉu cen=taṉ cāttaṉuñ cen=taṉ veṇkāṭaṉum
Ivai cāvā muvāp perāṭāka cantirātittavaṟ Aṭṭuvārāka
vum Ivaṉe Ittiruviḷakkerikka Iṭṭa tarā nilai viḷakku Oṉṟu
m Ivvūr vaṇṇār cantirātittavaṟ Utta
rāyaṉa caṅkirāntitoṟum Iṭakkaṭaviyatu(ā)ttūṇi Irukala
ttukku poliyūṭṭāka koṇṭa nellu kalam Ivare Itte
varkku nittaṟpaṭi citāri tiruppukaikku Ivaṉ vilaikkuk koṇṭu
ceyta nilam mutti vayakkalukku kiḻpāṟkellai ma ya kāṉaṟ
kuḷattukku pān=ta vākkālukku mekkum teṉpāṟkellai Ivvā
kkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kuvāvaṉ mayakkalukku ki
ḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai cuṭukāṭṭut tiṭalukku teṟkum Ivvicai
tta perunāṉkellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilam Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉ
ṟi kuṭinikkā tevatāṉamāka Ittevaraṭiyāḷ Āccaṉaṟiñcikaik
ku ceytu kuṭuttu Ivaṉe Āṭṭaivaṭṭam kotukulavaṉāṉa ma
rakkālāl vāṭākkaṭaṉ can=tirātittavaṟ Aṭṭuvatāṉa nellu
paṉṉirukalamum Aḷappatākavum Iññilañ cuṭṭi maṟṟep
perpaṭṭituñ ceyyātitākavum Iññilattukku Ilamaṉai
muṉ ceyyiṉ melaimaṉaiye Ilmaṉai Āvatākavum
Ivaṉe tiruppukaikku Iṭṭa tirātūpapāttiram niṟai Aṟu
pattu nāṟpalam Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai Itdhanmamra
kṣittār śrīpātaṅkaḷeṉṟalai melaṉa ....
Digital edition of SII 26.732 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
